name: KnowledgeSuite Inc.
summary: KnowledgeSuite Inc. engages in cloud solution and system engineering businesses in Japan. The company offers Knowledge Suite, a cloud-type integrated business application; VCRM, an online negotiation tool that connects customers and sales staff through the Web; GEOCRM, a mobile CRM cloud service; ROBOT ID, an integrated management application that centrally manages various accounts used by companies; and SHELTER, a business application platform to unify operations and manage various data in companies. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
